name: Directive
title: Directive by HTML5 UP
description: Clean single-page template with a distinctive centered header featuring a large paper-plane icon, site title, and subtitle. Below: a bold centered tagline. Main content uses alternating left/right feature blocks — each with an icon-overlaid image on one side and text on the other, creating a zigzag visual flow. CTA section with headline, description, and action button. Footer area has a 'Questions?' section with full contact form (name, email, message) and social icon row. White background with muted purple-gray text and green accent buttons. Uppercase letter-spaced headings throughout.

typography.style: Bold uppercase headings with wide letter-spacing. Clean, structured feel. Multiple font weights (300-700) for hierarchy.

layoutDetails: Centered container (max 51em). Alternating left/right feature blocks create zigzag flow. Sections separated by decorative SVG wave dividers (top/bottom curves). Full-height header area. Footer with centered form. Flexbox grid with responsive columns.
visualStyle: Clean, structured, professional. White background with warm gray text. Green accent for interactive elements. Alternating left/right content blocks with icon-overlaid images. Decorative SVG wave section dividers. Uppercase headings. Centered, symmetrical layout.

name: Escape Velocity
title: Escape Velocity by HTML5 UP
description: Multi-page corporate template with structured titled sections. Top navigation with dropdown menus. Each major section has a decorative title bar (e.g., 'The Introduction', 'The Details', 'The Endorsements'). Intro section with large headline, descriptive text, and CTA button. Main section with featured image and 6-item icon feature list in 2-column grid (comment, sync, image, cog, wrench, check icons) with dual action buttons. Highlights section with 3 image cards, titles, descriptions, and 'Learn More' buttons. Footer section titled 'The Rest Of It' with contact form, mailing address, social links, email, and phone. Dark header/nav area with light content sections. Warm coral-red accent on buttons.

typography.style: Black weight headings with regular body. Uppercase section titles with wide letter-spacing. Strong visual hierarchy. Title bars create clear section separation.

layoutDetails: Centered container (max 68-70em). Multiple page layouts: left-sidebar, right-sidebar, no-sidebar. Dark header/nav area contrasts with light content sections. Each section has a decorative title bar spanning full width. Feature list uses 2-column icon grid. Highlights use 3-column card grid. Footer splits into form + contact info columns. Fixed top navigation with dropdown support.
visualStyle: Structured, corporate, professional. Dark header/nav contrasts with clean white content. Decorative titled section dividers create clear visual rhythm. Warm coral-red accent on buttons and interactive elements. 3-column highlight cards. Icon-driven feature list. Strong section separation with title bars.

name: Forty
title: Forty by HTML5 UP
description: Bold dark-themed multipurpose landing page with a strong visual grid. Fixed top navigation bar with logo and hamburger menu toggle that reveals a fullscreen overlay menu with links and CTA buttons ('Get Started', 'Log In'). Large hero banner with dark background image, big heading, subtitle, and a 'Get Started' arrow button. Below: a 2x3 tile grid (6 articles) — each tile is a clickable card with a background image, title, and subtitle that reveals on hover with a colored overlay. Following section has a heading, paragraph text, and a 'Get Started' button. Contact section splits into two columns: left has a contact form (name, email, message, Send/Clear buttons); right has three contact methods (email, phone, address) with Font Awesome icons. Footer with social icon row (Twitter, Facebook, Instagram, GitHub, LinkedIn) and copyright. Multiple page layouts available (landing, generic, elements).

typography.style: Semi-bold uppercase headings with wide letter-spacing, light body text. Strong typographic hierarchy.

layoutDetails: Full-width layout with no max-width container. Tile grid uses CSS flexbox with 33.33% width tiles. Contact section uses 50/50 split. Overlay menu covers entire viewport. Multiple page templates available.
visualStyle: Dark, bold, and modern. Navy-blue base with vibrant multi-color tile overlays on hover. Strong contrast between dark backgrounds and bright accent colors. Image-heavy tiles with gradient overlays.

name: Fractal
title: Fractal by HTML5 UP
description: Clean light-themed app/product landing page designed for mobile app promotion. Hero section splits into two columns: left has the product name heading, subtitle, and two action buttons ('Download' primary blue, 'Learn More' outline with down-arrow); right shows a phone mockup frame containing an app screenshot image. Below: a centered section with a large heading and a row of 3 large icons (camera, sync, cloud) representing features. Then 3 alternating spotlight sections — each pairs an image on one side with a heading and description text on the other, alternating left-right layout. A row of 5 labeled icons (camera, sync, cloud, code, desktop) with descriptive text beneath each. Final CTA section with heading, subtitle, and two buttons ('Download' primary, 'Learn More'). Clean white background throughout with blue accent color.

typography.style: Clean, lightweight sans-serif. Normal weight headings with light body text. Minimal typographic decoration.

layoutDetails: Centered layout with max-width container. Hero uses 50/50 split with phone mockup on right. Spotlight sections alternate image/text positioning. Icon rows use flexbox with equal spacing. Fully responsive with stacking on mobile.
visualStyle: Clean, minimal, professional. White background with blue accent color. Phone mockup as hero visual. Alternating image-text sections create visual rhythm. No heavy shadows or gradients — flat and modern.

name: Helios
title: Helios by HTML5 UP
description: Elegant light-themed multipurpose template with a dramatic fullscreen header. Opens with a large header area featuring centered title, horizontal rule, subtitle, and a circular 'Start' scroll button. Horizontal navigation bar with dropdown menus (Home, Dropdown with submenu, Left Sidebar, Right Sidebar, No Sidebar). Below: a horizontally scrollable carousel of 10 article cards — each with a featured image, linked title, and short description. Main content section (wrapper style2) has a large featured image, heading, long-form text, and 'Continue Reading' button. Features section (wrapper style1) displays 3 columns of article cards — each with a featured image, heading, and description text. Footer is divided into 3 columns: Tweets feed (4 timestamped tweets), Posts list (4 linked post titles with timestamps), and Photos grid (6 thumbnail images in 2x3 grid). Bottom bar has social icons and copyright. Multiple page layouts available.

typography.style: Elegant Source Sans Pro throughout. Light body weight with normal heading weight. Clean and readable. Heading in header area is larger and more prominent.

layoutDetails: Full-width layout with wrapper sections. Header is fullscreen with centered content. Carousel uses horizontal overflow scroll with flexbox. Content sections use max-width containers. Footer uses 3-column grid. Multiple page templates (left sidebar, right sidebar, no sidebar).
visualStyle: Elegant, refined, light. Pale mint-gray background with white content areas. Dark plum header creates dramatic contrast. Salmon-coral accent adds warmth. Carousel provides dynamic content browsing. Overall feel is polished and editorial.

name: Landed
title: Landed by HTML5 UP
description: Dark-themed multipurpose landing page with dramatic fullscreen sections and parallax-style background images. Top navigation bar with logo, dropdown menus (Layouts submenu with Left/Right/No Sidebar options, nested submenu), and a 'Sign Up' primary button. Hero banner has a heading ('The future has landed'), subtitle, and a circular image, with a 'Next' scroll arrow. Three spotlight sections follow: first is a bottom-aligned spotlight with a full-width background image and 3-column text layout below; second is a right-aligned spotlight with background image and text overlay with 'Learn More' button; third is a left-aligned spotlight with background image and text. Feature section has a heading, subtitle, and a 2x3 grid of 6 icon feature cards (chart-area, comment, flask, paper-plane, file, lock) with descriptions. Email signup CTA section with heading, subtitle, email input, and 'Get Started' button. Footer with 6 social icons (Twitter, Facebook, LinkedIn, Instagram, GitHub, Email) and copyright. Multiple page layouts available.

typography.style: Light-weight Roboto throughout. Thin headings create an elegant, modern feel. Tight letter-spacing. Minimal typographic decoration.

layoutDetails: Full-width sections with background images using background-attachment: fixed for parallax effect. Container-based content with max-width. Spotlight sections use different alignment patterns (bottom, right, left). Feature grid uses 3-column layout with responsive breakpoints. Multiple page templates available.
visualStyle: Dark, dramatic, cinematic. Near-black background with fullscreen background images and parallax scrolling. Coral-red accent creates strong visual anchors. Spotlight sections with image overlays create depth. Overall feel is premium and modern.

name: Paradigm Shift
title: Paradigm Shift by HTML5 UP
description: Modern scroll-driven portfolio/showcase with a unique side-by-side layout. Intro section: left side has heading, subtitle, and down-arrow scroll button; right side shows a large hero image. Content flows as alternating header-left/content-right sections: Section 1 has heading + paragraph with a large image. Section 2 has heading + 6 icon feature items (laptop, bolt, signal, cog, map-marker, code) in a 2-column list. Section 3 contains three sub-galleries with titles and descriptions, displaying images in mixed landscape/portrait grid layouts (4+3+3 images with lightbox). Final CTA section with heading, text, and two action buttons. White background with black text and mint/cyan accent (#49fcd4). Clean, editorial feel with generous whitespace.

typography.style: Heavy geometric headings with light body text, strong weight contrast, editorial feel

layoutDetails: Side-by-side layout: header/label on left (sticky on desktop), content on right. Sections stack vertically with generous spacing. Gallery uses CSS grid with mixed aspect ratios. Responsive collapses to single column.
visualStyle: Clean, modern, editorial. High contrast black-on-white with vibrant mint accent. Generous whitespace and strong typographic hierarchy. Side-by-side layout creates a unique scrolling rhythm.

name: Phantom
title: Phantom by HTML5 UP
description: Elegant tile-based multipurpose template with a slide-out menu. Header bar with SVG logo icon, site name, and hamburger menu trigger. Slide-out navigation panel with 5 menu items. Main content area: large heading and intro paragraph, followed by a 12-tile image grid in a responsive layout. Each tile has a background image, title, description, and colored hover overlay (6 different accent colors cycle: pink, teal, yellow, purple, blue, green). Tiles link to inner pages. Footer with two columns: contact form (Name, Email, Message, Send) and social/follow icons (Twitter, Facebook, Instagram, Dribbble, GitHub, 500px, Phone, Email). White background with pink primary accent (#f2849e).

typography.style: Heavy black headings with ultra-light body, wide letter-spacing on uppercase elements

layoutDetails: Tile grid uses CSS flexbox with responsive wrapping. Tiles are equal-width with aspect ratio maintained. Slide-out menu overlays from right side. Footer uses 2-column layout. Max-width container for content.
visualStyle: Elegant, colorful, tile-based. White background with multi-colored tile hover overlays creating a playful yet sophisticated feel. Pink primary accent. Slide-out menu adds modern interaction.

name: Photon
title: Photon by HTML5 UP
description: Colorful single-page landing with alternating light/dark sections and bold icon features. Hero section: centered cloud icon, large heading, subtitle, and 'Discover' scroll button on a colored background. Section One (white bg): 2-column layout with heading + paragraph on left, large image on right. Section Two (dark bg): left side has a 2x3 grid of 6 large styled icons (code, bolt, camera, cog, desktop, calendar) each with a unique color ring, right side has heading and paragraphs. Section Three (white bg): centered heading, 3-column card grid with images, titles, descriptions, and 'More' buttons. Section Four (dark bg): centered CTA with heading and two wide buttons ('Sign Up', 'Learn More'). Footer with social icons and copyright. Multi-color palette with teal, blue, green, and purple accents.

typography.style: Ultra-light weight throughout, clean and airy feel with generous spacing

layoutDetails: Full-width alternating sections with centered container. 2-column layouts use 6-6 grid split. Card section uses 3-column grid. Icon grid is 2x3. Responsive collapses to single column.
visualStyle: Colorful, friendly, modern landing page. Alternating light/dark sections create visual rhythm. Multi-colored icon rings add playfulness. Teal-green primary with blue, pink, and green secondary accents.

name: Solid State
title: Solid State by HTML5 UP
description: Dark, bold multipurpose template with a sci-fi industrial aesthetic. Hamburger menu opens a fullscreen overlay navigation. Banner section with a gem icon, large heading, and subtitle. Three alternating spotlight sections with side-by-side image and text layout — each with a 'Learn more' link styled as a bordered button. Spotlights alternate between left-image/right-text and right-image/left-text with different colored backgrounds (style1 dark blue, style2 slate, style3 teal). Features section with a 2x2 grid of image cards, each with heading, description, and 'Learn more' link. Footer with contact form (Name, Email, Message), address/phone/email info, and social links (Twitter, Facebook, Instagram). Dark navy background throughout with uppercase headings and Raleway font.

typography.style: Raleway for headings with heavy uppercase tracking, Source Sans Pro light body. High contrast weight pairing with industrial feel.

layoutDetails: Full-width sections with max-width inner containers. Spotlight sections use flexbox for side-by-side image/text. Features grid is 2x2. Responsive with stacking on mobile.
visualStyle: Dark, industrial, sci-fi aesthetic. Deep navy backgrounds with subtle transparency layers. Bold uppercase headings with wide letter-spacing. Gem icon branding. Feels like a tech company or startup.

name: Spectral
title: Spectral by HTML5 UP
description: Dark atmospheric landing page with fullscreen background image banner. Top header with site name and hamburger menu toggle that reveals a slide-in overlay menu. Banner section with large heading, multi-line subtitle, primary 'Activate' CTA button, and a 'Learn More' scroll-down arrow. Section One: centered text block with 3 large circular icons (gem, heart, code) in a row. Section Two: 3 spotlight rows with alternating image-left/text-right layout, each with a large photo and descriptive text. Section Three: 6-item icon feature grid (2x3) with paper-plane, laptop, code, headphones, heart, flag icons — each with heading and description. CTA section with heading, subtitle, and two stacked buttons (Activate + Learn More). Footer with social icon row (Twitter, Facebook, Instagram, Dribbble, Email) and copyright.

typography.style: Heavy uppercase headings with extreme letter-spacing. Open Sans body with moderate tracking. Bold, impactful typographic hierarchy.

layoutDetails: Full-width sections with centered inner containers. Spotlight sections use side-by-side image/text. Feature grid is 3-column. CTA section uses stacked buttons. Responsive with stacking on mobile.
visualStyle: Dark, moody, atmospheric. Fullscreen background image with overlay. Bold red accent on buttons. Heavy uppercase headings create a dramatic, cinematic feel. Suitable for product launches or creative agencies.

name: Story
title: Story by HTML5 UP
description: Modular storytelling template with alternating content/image sections. Fullscreen hero banner with left-aligned heading, subtitle, and 'Get Started' button alongside a right-side full-height image. Three spotlight sections alternate image position (right, left, right) — each with heading, paragraph, and 'Learn More' button paired with a large photo. Gallery section with a 4-column masonry-style lightbox grid of 12 thumbnail images, each with title, description, and 'Details' button overlay on hover. Icon features section with a 4x3 grid of 12 icon items (gem, save, chart, wifi, cog, paper-plane, desktop, sync, hashtag, bolt, envelope, leaf) — each with heading and description. Contact form section with Name, Email, and Message fields plus 'Send Message' button. Footer with social icons (Twitter, Facebook, Instagram, LinkedIn, Email) and copyright. Clean white theme with black primary buttons that turn cyan on hover.

typography.style: Ultra-light weight with tight heading spacing. Labels use uppercase with wide tracking. Minimal, editorial feel.

layoutDetails: Full-width sections with alternating content/image split (50/50). Gallery uses CSS grid with 4 columns. Icon features use 4x3 grid. Contact form uses medium-width centered container. Responsive with stacking on mobile.
visualStyle: Clean, white, editorial. Alternating content blocks create visual rhythm. Black buttons with cyan hover add subtle color pop. Gallery lightbox for image showcase. Modern, minimal storytelling approach.

name: Telephasic
title: Telephasic by HTML5 UP
description: Clean multipurpose template with a prominent header area. Top navigation bar with site name 'Telephasic' and horizontal menu including dropdown with nested submenus (Left Sidebar, Right Sidebar, No Sidebar). Hero section with large heading, subtitle, and CTA button. Features 1 section: 2-column layout with two side-by-side image/text blocks — each with a featured image, heading, description, and 'Elevate my awareness' button. Promo banner: full-width dark bar with bold text and a CTA button. Features 2 section: 3-column grid of image cards with descriptions and a centered 'Elevate my awareness' button. Footer with contact form (Name, Email, Message, Send/Clear buttons), social media links in two columns (Twitter, Facebook, Dribbble, Instagram, YouTube, Pinterest), and copyright. Light blue-gray background with red accent color.

typography.style: Light weight throughout (300) with uppercase navigation. Clean, airy feel. Logo uses wide letter-spacing for brand emphasis.

layoutDetails: Full-width sections with centered containers. Features 1 uses 2-column grid. Features 2 uses 3-column grid. Footer is 2-column (form + social links). Dropdown navigation with nested submenus. Responsive with narrower breakpoint at 820px.
visualStyle: Clean, professional, corporate. Light blue-gray background with white content areas. Red accent on links and interactive elements. Promo banner adds visual break. Suitable for business or startup sites.

name: Tessellate
title: Tessellate by HTML5 UP
description: Bold single-page template with alternating light and dark content sections creating a tessellated pattern. Header: centered heading and subtitle on a dark background with a 'Proceed to second phase' scroll button. Section First: light header with heading and subtitle, followed by a dark content block with 3-column icon feature grid (clock, bolt, cloud icons in circular badges) and a scroll button. Section Second: light header, then dark content with a 4/8 column split — left side has descriptive text with a scroll button, right side has a 2x3 grid of 6 clickable images. Section Third: light header, then dark content with a full-width featured image followed by 3-column text layout with detailed paragraphs and a scroll button. Section Fourth: light header with heading and subtitle, then a centered contact form (Name, Email, Message, Send/Clear buttons). Footer with social icons (Twitter, Facebook, Instagram, Dribbble, GitHub) and copyright. Alternating light/dark sections with smooth scroll navigation between them.

typography.style: Ultra-thin headings (weight 100) with light body (300). Roboto font creates a modern, Google-inspired feel. Extreme weight contrast between headings and body.

layoutDetails: Full-width alternating sections. Each section has a light header area and dark content area. Content uses various column layouts (3-col, 4/8 split, 3-col text). Contact form uses medium-width centered container. Smooth scroll between sections.
visualStyle: Bold tessellated pattern of alternating light and dark sections. Ultra-thin Roboto headings on light backgrounds contrast with dark content blocks. Circular icon badges in feature section. Modern, geometric, structured feel.

name: Twenty
title: Twenty by HTML5 UP
description: Clean, modern multipurpose landing page with a light blue-grey palette. Fixed top navigation bar with logo, dropdown menus, and a 'Sign Up' CTA button. Full-width hero banner with centered heading 'TWENTY', subtitle text, and a 'Tell Me More' scroll button. Below the banner: an intro section with a large icon (chart-bar) and descriptive text. Section One features a two-column layout (8/4 grid) with descriptive text on the left and a 3x2 grid of 6 circular feature icons (clock, volume, laptop, inbox, lock, cog) on the right. Section Two presents a 3-column grid of icon-based feature cards, each with a checkmark icon, heading, and paragraph. Section Three shows a 2x2 grid of image cards with titles and descriptions, plus a 'See More' button. A dark CTA section with heading and dual action buttons. Footer with 5 circular social media icons and copyright. Preloader animation on page load.

colorPalette.heading: #7c8081 (inherits body color)
colorPalette.bannerOverlay: url overlay pattern on colored backgrounds

typography.style: Ultra-light weight throughout with uppercase headings, clean and airy feel

layoutDetails: Max-width container, 12-column grid system with responsive breakpoints. Banner is full-width with centered inline-block content. Sections alternate between white and light grey backgrounds. Uses gtr-50 row gutters.
visualStyle: Light, clean, modern with teal accent. Alternating section backgrounds, circular icons, image cards with hover effects. Minimal borders, generous whitespace.

name: Txt
title: TXT by HTML5 UP
description: Content-rich multipurpose template with a magazine/blog hybrid layout. Top header area with large logo 'TXT' and subtitle. Horizontal navigation bar with dropdown menus below the header. Hero banner section with welcome heading, subtitle, and CTA button. Main content area starts with a highlight section featuring a row of 4 circular icon links (search, tablet, flask, cog) with a heading and description below. Next, a 4-column feature grid with image cards, each containing a featured image, linked heading, and description text, plus dual action buttons. Below that, a blog section in a 9/3 column layout: left side has a featured blog post with image, metadata (time, comments), and 'Continue Reading' button; right sidebar shows 5 archived post summaries with timestamps and comment counts, plus an 'Archives' button. Footer has two rows: an 'About' section and a 'Get in touch' section with 5 social media icon links. Multi-page layout with left/right/no sidebar page variants.

typography.style: Dual font family — condensed bold for headings/buttons, regular for body. Clean editorial feel.

layoutDetails: Container-based layout with 12-column grid. Blog section uses 9/3 split for content/sidebar. Feature grid uses 3/6/12 responsive columns. Navigation is full-width bar below header.
visualStyle: Light, editorial, content-focused. Sage green-grey palette with dark teal accents. Bordered sections with subtle dividers. Magazine-style blog layout with metadata.

name: One Page Wonder
title: One Page Wonder - Start Bootstrap Template
description: Vibrant single-page marketing template with a bold gradient hero section featuring pink-to-orange (linear-gradient from #ee0979 to #ff6a00) background and four decorative translucent circles as geometric accents. Fixed dark semi-transparent navbar with uppercase brand and Sign Up / Log In links. Hero contains a large heading, subheading, and a rounded-pill CTA button. Below the hero, three alternating content sections each display a circular image alongside a display-4 heading and paragraph text in a 2-column grid layout — odd sections place the image on the right, even sections on the left. Black footer with centered copyright. Clean, modern aesthetic with strong color contrast and playful geometric shapes.

typography.style: Bold geometric headings with clean body text, high weight contrast between Catamaran headings and Lato body

layoutDetails: Bootstrap 5 container with px-5 padding. Hero uses relative positioning with absolute circle elements. Content sections use row/col-lg-6 two-column grid with order classes for alternating layout. Max container width ~1320px.
visualStyle: Vibrant, playful, modern. Bold pink-to-orange gradient hero with floating translucent circles. Clean white content sections with circular images. Strong color energy with geometric accents.

name: Knox
title: Knox - Demo
description: Elegant coming soon / launch page template with three style variations (static background, slideshow, particles). Similar structure to Khronos but with a distinctly different aesthetic using serif typography and warm earth tones. Features a fullscreen hero with countdown timer (days, hours, minutes, seconds) and launch announcement headline. Below-fold tabbed info section with About, Services, and Subscribe tabs. Services tab shows 6 items in a 2-column grid with SVG icons. Subscribe tab has email newsletter form. Footer with company info, social SVG icons, and contact details. Header with logo and social links. Animated scroll indicator. Uses CSS custom properties with olive/burgundy/gold color scheme and serif font pairing (Lora + Gothic A1 + Marcellus).

typography.fontFamily: Lora, serif (body); Gothic A1, sans-serif (UI); Marcellus, serif (display)
typography.style: Elegant serif typography with Lora for body, Marcellus for display headings, and Gothic A1 for UI elements. Three-font system for rich typographic hierarchy.

layoutDetails: Single-page scrolling layout with fullscreen hero. 12-column grid system. Tabbed content section. Two-column footer stacking on mobile. Multiple breakpoints for fine-grained responsive control.
visualStyle: Dark, elegant, warm-toned coming soon page with olive, burgundy, and gold accents. Serif typography gives a classic, refined feel. Earth-tone palette creates a luxurious, sophisticated atmosphere.

name: Lounge
title: Lounge
description: Elegant cafe/restaurant single-page template with a refined editorial aesthetic. Opens with a fullscreen hero featuring the cafe name in large serif typography with a subtle scroll indicator. The about section tells the cafe's story with descriptive text. The menu section uses a tabbed interface with three tabs (Signature Blends, Freshly Baked Pastries, Gourmet Treats), each displaying 5 menu items with names, descriptions, and prices in a clean list format. A photo gallery section shows images in a Swiper slider with GLightbox lightbox for fullscreen viewing. The testimonials section displays client quotes. The footer contains contact info (email, phone), social links (FB, IG, PI, X), and a newsletter signup form with email input. Navigation is a clean top bar with smooth-scroll links (Intro, About, Menu, Gallery). Uses CSS custom properties with a green/brown warm palette and elegant serif+sans-serif font pairing (Playfair Display + Roboto Flex).

typography.fontFamily: Roboto Flex, sans-serif (body); Playfair Display, serif (headings/display)
typography.style: Elegant serif display headings (Playfair Display) with clean sans-serif body (Roboto Flex). Refined typographic hierarchy suited for hospitality and dining.

layoutDetails: Single-page scrolling with clean top navigation. Full-width sections with centered content containers. Tabbed menu with 3 categories. Swiper slider for gallery. CSS custom properties for consistent theming.
visualStyle: Dark, warm, elegant cafe aesthetic with forest green and caramel brown accents. Serif display typography creates a refined, editorial feel. Sophisticated and inviting atmosphere suited for upscale dining.

name: Astro Motion
title: Astro Motion by TemplateMo
description: Fullscreen video background template with single-page tabbed navigation. Fixed background video (astro timelapse) covers viewport with fallback image. Flexbox column layout with 30px padding. Navbar with large brand (2.4rem) and 4 nav items with bottom borders and circular dot indicators turning green (#99FF66) on active. Content as horizontal slider: Home has 2-column layout with dark semi-transparent text panel and 2 stacked images with corner circles; Gallery has Slick carousel with 9 images and Julia hover effect; About has right-aligned dark panel; Contact has form and Google Maps. Footer with copyright. Split-screen preloader.

typography.style: Light sans-serif with generous line-height on dark background

layoutDetails: Bootstrap 5 fluid grid, flexbox page container, max-width 1860px, tabbed content pages
visualStyle: Cinematic dark template with astro video background and neon green accents

name: Avalon
title: Avalon HTML Template
description: Modern creative multipurpose template with bold split-banner hero and event listing. Banner has 2-column layout: left (8-col) with background image, 64px heading, decorative line, and white bordered button; right (4-col) with golden yellow (#f4bc51) background, logo, uppercase heading, subtitle, social circles. Best Offer section with sidebar and content area with heading, bullet list, pink button, and image. Events section with filterable list (Show All, Design Meeting, App Start Up, Web Conferences), each row with date badge, title, time, and button. Testimonial with left image and right Owl Carousel (3 items). Services with 4 CSS 3D flip-cards. Contact with form and map marker. Footer with social icons.

typography.style: Clean sans-serif with bold headings and small body text

layoutDetails: Bootstrap 3 fluid container, full-width sections, 680px min-height banner, split-column hero
visualStyle: Bold creative template with golden yellow accents, split hero, and interactive flip cards

name: Awesome
title: Awesome Responsive Template
description: Dark-themed corporate single-page template with typed text animation. Top header bar with phone, email, and 4 social icons. White sticky navbar with brand and 6 uppercase links. Hero with fullscreen background, 70px heading with blue highlighted word, Typed.js animated text, and transparent bordered button. About with 3-column feature cards (bordered square icons). Team with 4-column grid of member cards on dark gray (#404040). Service with 3-column icons (middle highlighted). Portfolio with 4x2 grid (8 thumbnails) with hover overlay. Contact with 2-column form and address. Footer with copyright.

typography.style: Bold uppercase headings with light body on dark background

layoutDetails: Bootstrap 3 grid, 60px vertical padding, sticky navbar, 4-column team/portfolio grids
visualStyle: Professional dark corporate template with bright blue accents and typed text animation

name: Black White
title: Black White HTML5 Template
description: Split-screen two-tone template with black left sidebar and white right content area. Left sidebar (38%) has black background with white Black heading, vertical stacked navigation with 6 bordered rounded links each with Font Awesome icon, turning white bg with black text on hover. Right content (62%) has white background with White heading, page title, featured image, and article blocks with headings, paragraphs, and warning buttons. Multi-page with Products, Services, Testimonials, About, and Contact pages. Footer with copyright and social icons. CSS table-cell layout for equal-height columns, stacks on mobile.

typography.style: Clean sans-serif with high contrast black/white layout

layoutDetails: CSS table-cell layout, 38%/62% split, max-width 710px right content, stacks at 767px
visualStyle: Bold black-and-white split-screen layout with gold accent details

name: Breezed
title: Breezed HTML Bootstrap Template
description: Multi-section single-page agency/business template built on Bootstrap 4. Starts with a sticky header navigation featuring logo, menu links (Home, About, Projects, Contact Us) with dropdown submenu support and a search icon overlay. Below is a fullscreen image slider (3 slides) powered by Owl Carousel with heading, subtitle, and dual CTA buttons (stroked + filled). A scroll-down arrow leads to the About section with a 2-column layout: left side has section heading, 4 service icon cards in a 2x2 grid, and a CTA button; right side has descriptive text. Next is a 3-column Features section with icon-image cards each with description and arrow link. A centered Subscribe/Newsletter section follows with email input and submit button. The Projects section uses Isotope filterable grid (4 categories) displaying 6 thumbnail images in a 3-column grid with Lightbox popups. A Team section uses Owl Carousel to display 7 member cards with photo, hover social icons overlay, name and role. Contact section has left column with contact info and right column with a form. Footer has copyright text and social icon links. Includes preloader animation.

typography.style: Clean sans-serif with uppercase accents and generous letter-spacing on interactive elements

layoutDetails: Bootstrap 4 grid, container-based layout. 12-column grid with col-lg-6, col-lg-4, col-lg-3 breakdowns. Sticky header navigation. Full-width slider. Sections alternate between white and light gray backgrounds.

name: Catalog Z
